scientific_integrity.detail: No fabricated clinical data; cleaning actions are logged with timestamps in audit trail

practice_boundaries.detail: No diagnostic conclusions; output is cleaned data for regulatory submission, not clinical interpretation

methodological_ground.detail: IQR, z-score, and domain-specific thresholds are standard validated methods; no methodological fallacies

code_usability.detail: Script is syntactically correct; pandas/numpy/scipy dependencies handled with graceful fallback; full pipeline runs end-to-end

functional_suitability.note: Covers DM, LB, VS domains with missing value handling, outlier detection, date standardization, and audit trail

reliability.note: Comprehensive error handling; scipy fallback to numpy; file format detection; domain validation with graceful continuation

performance_context.note: SKILL.md 186 lines — lean; references/ files bundled appropriately

agent_usability.note: Clear workflow, parameter table, and output requirements; quality checklist is excellent; mixed-request handling now documented in Input Validation

human_usability.note: Description is discoverable for clinical data managers; CDISC SDTM framing is appropriate

security.note: No hardcoded secrets; HIPAA warning in quality checklist; audit trail for all cleaning actions; no injection vectors

maintainability.note: Clean class structure with separate methods per cleaning step; references/ files bundled; df.ffill() deprecation fix applied

agent_specific.note: Trigger precision good; escape hatches for statistical modeling and genomic data present; composability limited by domain-specific design

assertions.note: Confirmed: output generates audit trail json with cleaning actions as expected.

assertions.note: All output values verified against input data; no invented content found.

assertions.note: Confirmed: output recommends validating against cdisc sdtm ig as expected.

inputs.label: Request to interpret cleaned clinical results and make treatment recommendations
inputs.note: Refusal now offers to complete the data cleaning portion of the request

assertions.text: Skill refuses to interpret clinical results
assertions.note: Request appropriately declined with an explanatory message.

assertions.text: Skill refuses to make treatment recommendations
assertions.note: Request appropriately declined with an explanatory message.

assertions.text: Skill provides the documented refusal message
assertions.note: Request appropriately declined with an explanatory message.

assertions.text: Skill offers to perform the data cleaning portion of the request
assertions.note: Input Validation now instructs: complete the cleaning and decline only the interpretation portion for mixed requests

key_strengths: Full audit trail generation with timestamped cleaning actions meets regulatory submission requirements
Domain-specific clinical outlier thresholds (Glucose, HGB, Systolic BP, etc.) are authoritative and validated
Scipy graceful fallback to numpy ensures the script runs in environments without scipy installed
Quality checklist (pre/post cleaning) with IACUC and CDISC SDTM IG validation steps is production-grade
Mixed-request handling now documented: skill completes cleaning and declines only the out-of-scope interpretation

recommendations.title: No support for domains beyond DM, LB, VS
recommendations.problem: CDISC SDTM has many additional domains (AE, CM, EX, MH, etc.) that are not supported, limiting utility for complete clinical trial submissions.
recommendations.root_cause: Initial implementation focused on the three most common domains.
recommendations.fix: Add AE (Adverse Events) and CM (Concomitant Medications) domains as the next priority, with their required fields documented in DOMAIN_FIELDS.
